name: vote-restart
description: Vote Restart — players vote democratically to restart the server. Dynamic threshold based on online non-immune players.

voteDuration.description: How long the voting window stays open in seconds

cooldownDuration.description: Cooldown period in seconds after a failed/expired vote before a new one can start

restartDelay.description: Delay in seconds after vote passes before the restart command is executed

restartCommand.description: Raw game server command to execute when restart is triggered

passThreshold.description: Percentage of online non-immune players needed to pass the vote

minimumPlayers.description: Minimum number of online non-immune players required to start a vote

permissions.description: Allows a player to start a server restart vote with /voterestart
Excludes a player from the voter pool and denominator for restart votes

voterestart.description: Start a vote to restart the server
voterestart.helpText: Start a democratic vote to restart the server. Requires the VOTE_RESTART_INITIATE permission.

votestatus.description: Shows whether a restart vote is active, passed, or not running.
votestatus.helpText: Check the current status of the restart vote.

voteyes.description: Cast a yes vote for the current restart vote
voteyes.helpText: Vote yes for an ongoing server restart vote. No special permission required.

check-vote.description: Evaluate vote state every minute: check expiry, tally effective votes, and execute restart when delay elapsed
